name: Dracula
bio:
The oldest vampire in the world, the Night Emperor, a supreme being beyond life and death. Regarded as a calamity. Though a member of the Vampire Clan, he is seen by Demon Hunters as a more dangerous existence than demons.

Role: Physical Damage Dealer
Specialty: A frontline Defense-type hero that accumulates Demon Energy every turn to strengthen its damage. When reaching a certain value, it gains Demon Power to increase ATK/DEF attributes and gain Control Immunity.

skillSlots.name: Doomblade Execution
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 highest-ATK enemies for 160% P.DMG with 80% probability to apply 1 stack of [Cowardice].

skillSlots.name: Hour of Termination
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 highest-Crit enemies for 240% P.DMG with 60% probability to apply [Bleed].

effects.name: Demon Power
effects.description: 100% of DMG dealt and received is converted into equal [Demon Energy].

effects.name: Demon Power
effects.description: When [Demon Energy] reaches max capacity, instantly heals 30% Max HP and gains [Demon Power].

effects.name: Demon Power
effects.description: Recovers 15% lost HP when attacked while below 60% HP (max 1 trigger per turn).

effects.name: Demon Power
effects.description: [Moment of the End] additionally deals 80% P.DMG to all enemies.
